Params: {1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1398.jpg', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Bionic Machine', 3: 'Block all entrances and exits as instructed!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Bionic Machine', 3: 'Cover weak spots with extra personnel. Don\'t give the enemy a single opening.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Arctic Personnel', 3: 'On it!', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Rosetta', 3: 'Entrusting tactical positioning to you, Commandant, was clearly the right call... We Forest Guards aren\'t accustomed to urban combat.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'It\'s nothing, really.', 3: '15', 4: 'I wonder how the others are doing.', 5: '28'}
{2: 'Rosetta', 3: 'When there\'s an opportunity, I should visit Babylonia to improve my tactical leadership.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Scout', 3: 'Report: Signal array installation complete. City-wide communications are now uninterrupted.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Signal array? What\'s that?', 3: '23'}
{2: 'Scout', 3: 'A series of relay stations. The Arctic\'s magnetic field is far more chaotic than other regions; we deploy these wherever signal reception drops.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Rosetta', 3: 'It could also be deliberate jamming. Commandant, you recall when we lost contact with Dark Aries earlier? That was likely artificial interference.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Rosetta', 3: 'Then let\'s establish the link immediately. We must confirm our next move as soon as possible.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Scout', 3: 'Understood. Establishing connection now.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Rosetta', 3: 'Given our earlier loss of contact with Dark Aries, your concern is understandable, Commandant.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Rosetta', 3: 'Scout, can you connect now?', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Scout', 3: 'Affirmative. In fact, they\'ve just sent a connection request as well.', 4: '2'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStoryBlackPassScene.prefab', 2: '3'}

{3: 'Following the instructions, the scout sets the briefcase down in the snow. Its lid opens automatically, a metal antenna extends, and a pale blue hologram glows to life, cutting cleanly through the snowy mist.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStoryMidAutumnMessageOpen.prefab', 2: '3', 5: '1'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png', 3: '0', 4: '0.5', 5: '0.2'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStoryMidAutumnMessageLoop3.prefab', 2: '3', 5: '2'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryTongxunNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{3: 'Data streams flicker and swirl for a moment before resolving into the forms of Simon, Mina, Diana, and Lee—the core command, present at every front.'}
{2: 'Simon, what\'s your status?', 3: '53', 4: 'Mina, you look furious.', 5: '61', 6: 'Diana, you\'re back?', 7: '70'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Simon', 3: 'We\'re managing with minimal casualties. We can still fight. If the enemy would kindly "go easy on us."', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Palma', 3: 'Yeah, right. Like that\'s gonna happen.', 4: '2'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Rosetta', 3: 'I reviewed the scouts\' briefing before joining. The battle is proceeding favorably, and Commandant and I have made an unexpected discovery.', 4: '18'}
{1: 'DialogEnable'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Mina', 3: 'Hmph! You Babylonians are the ones with nerve. When did you start planting spies here? Wait, does the former Union even count as us?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Dr. Bear', 3: 'I guess it does?', 4: '2'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Rosetta', 3: 'I reviewed the scouts\' briefing before joining. The battle is proceeding favorably, and Commandant and I have made an unexpected discovery.', 4: '18'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Diana', 3: 'Long time, 【kuroname】. No, I\'m not physically back. The Corrupted are scattered across the region, and I\'m clearing threats.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Diana', 3: 'But I\'m on a break now, so I linked in to check on everyone.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Rosetta', 3: 'I reviewed the scouts\' briefing before joining. The battle is proceeding favorably, and Commandant and I have made an unexpected discovery.', 4: '18'}

{1: '1', 2: 'Rosetta', 3: 'The bionic whale pod. After defeating Dulova, one of the Warlords, we recovered devices capable of recalling them. With proper guidance, the whales could become a significant asset in this war.', 4: '18'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Diana', 3: '...I was under the impression there was no way to bring the pod back.', 4: '1'}

{2: 'Mina', 3: 'Which is why I\'ve been telling those old-timers at the other ports to fund more tech excavation. Everything\'s been a mess since the last Chief Captain died. Sigh, what a disaster.', 4: '2'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Simon', 3: 'But won\'t the enemy use those devices as well? The whales would be viable combat power for them, too. How do we ensure recalled whales fight on our side?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Dr. Bear', 3: 'Bionic whales are basically big, good-hearted fish. If we fit them with anti-Amalgamation modules, I\'m confident they\'ll side with us.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Then who handles this?', 3: '93'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Mina', 3: 'Our rear support team, naturally. We can\'t pull personnel from your frontline.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Palma', 3: 'We\'re stretched thin as it is. Any fewer troops and this war\'s good as lost.', 4: '2'}

{2: 'Mina', 3: 'Since I\'ve got the floor, update on Rosetta\'s frame. We\'ve made contact with Asimov, Babylonia\'s Chief Technician, but we still haven\'t found a way to fully activate it.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'So even Asimov couldn\'t do anything about it?', 3: '99'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Asimov', 3: 'I\'ll take over the explanation from here.', 4: '3'}
{3: 'Asimov\'s image abruptly cuts in, displacing Mina\'s projection to the edge of the screen.'}
{2: 'Asimov', 3: 'Malkuth\'s design is... unique. Its creator implemented no activation protocols. It is, effectively, a machine without a power button.', 4: '3'}
{2: 'Why design a frame that way?', 3: '112'}

{2: 'Asimov', 3: 'We\'re still investigating. However, I must clarify: it\'s not that we lack leads. Full activation is linked to M.I.N.D. stability, but the required threshold... Let\'s just say it\'s currently unattainable.', 4: '3'}
{2: 'Specifically?', 3: '114'}
{2: 'Asimov', 3: 'Close to ten thousand percent.', 4: '3'}
{2: 'Everyone', 3: 'What?'}
{3: 'At Asimov\'s absurd—almost comical—words, every jaw hangs open in stunned disbelief.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Asimov', 3: 'I\'ve had my assistant re-run all calculations. Theoretically, either the formula is wrong, or I am.', 4: '3'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lee', 3: 'But there\'s also the chance it\'s actually correct, isn\'t there?', 4: '18'}
{3: 'Asimov nods, and the room falls instantly silent. If this conclusion is correct, it means everyone here is attempting the impossible.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Rosetta', 3: 'It\'s better than being told it\'s outright impossible. This is the best outcome we could hope for. Now, we continue preparing. We continue fighting.', 4: '18'}
{2: 'Asimov', 3: 'Proceed at your own pace. I will handle the technical side. If the manuscript\'s calculations prove accurate, this frame could be the decisive factor in ending this war.', 4: '3'}
{3: 'Asimov is referring to the report\'s section on Malkuth\'s output capacity, but the figures are so extreme they strain credulity.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Noan', 3: 'If we\'re done discussing the frame, perhaps we should return our attention to the battlefield. Has anyone else noticed the Corrupted seem... endless?', 4: '1'}
{2: '...Did anything catch your attention?', 3: '134'}
{2: 'Noan', 3: 'According to Antonov and his team, this district was once the central industrial zone of Sophiasburgh. There are quite a few production lines beneath us.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Antonov', 3: 'Right, and we\'ve already sent out scouts... Elevators to lower levels appear every few blocks. New Corrupted emerge from them at regular intervals.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Rosetta', 3: 'They\'re consuming and producing simultaneously. Commandant, it seems our enemy has already decided our next tactical move for us.', 4: '18'}
{2: 'Then we destroy the source.', 3: '142'}
{2: 'Rosetta', 3: 'Correct. Until we understand the full extent of enemy resources, striking their supply lines is our most effective course of action.', 4: '18'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Simon', 3: 'No objections. I\'ll coordinate our field teams to hit these targets.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Lee', 3: 'I\'m stretched thin here. To maintain our own supply lines, we won\'t be able to join this operation.', 4: '2'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Mina', 3: 'I\'ll oversee the anti-Amalgamation modules for the whales and keep working with Asimov on Malkuth\'s activation.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Diana', 3: 'Rosetta, the rest of the Forest Guards and I will return as soon as our support mission is complete. Be careful until then.', 4: '2'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStoryMidAutumnMessageEnd.prefab', 2: '3', 5: '3'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png', 3: '0.5', 4: '0', 5: '0.2'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryTongxunNew.prefab'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStoryMidAutumnMessageLoop3.prefab', 5: '2'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStoryMidAutumnMessageEnd.prefab', 5: '3'}
{3: 'With the plans laid out, Rosetta turns. Her gaze finds you.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Rosetta', 3: 'It seems the war is entering its next phase... I took command last time, Commandant. How about you lead this one?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Rosetta', 3: 'I believe everyone here would like to hear the order from you directly.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'This is part of Rosetta\'s consideration for troop morale. In that case, the move should be—'}
{2: 'Operation begins now!', 3: '170'}
{1: 'DialogEnable'}
{2: 'Everyone', 3: 'On it!'}
